properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 56/19
SURVEY VESSEL POLAR DUCHESS CS 5BJC3 WILL CONDUCT SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 01 JULY 2019 UNTIL 15 OCT 2019
TOWING 12 X 6 NM LONG CABLES IN SURVEY AREA BOUNDED BY:


A. 66-51N 000-47E
B. 65-05N 003-17E
C. 65-39N 005-48E
D. 67-27N 003-22E 


WIDE BERTH FROM AREA REQUESTED.
7 NM CLEARANCE REQUESTED ASTERN AND A 2.0 NM CLEARANCE IS REQUESTED AHEAD AND ABEAM OF THE VESSEL. 
SUPPORT VESSELS, M.V. SANCO SKY CS ZDHW AND MV MARJA CS YJVZ2.
